titleStmt.title: SII 9.511: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 511. (A.R. No. 425 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A PRIVATE BUILDING-SITE TO THE NORTH OF DODDAKERE-KATTE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1441, Pramādi, Kārtika, śu. 2, Maṅgaḷavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1519. October 25, Tuesday, in the reign of Kṛishṇārāya-Mahārāya. It records that while Vijayappa-Voḍeya, son of Ratnappa-Voḍeya, was ruling over Bārakūrarājya, Tirumaka-Seṭṭiti, wife of Nāraṇa-Seṭṭi and daughter of Joki-Seṭṭi, caused the construction of a maṭha in the Paḍuvakēri of Basrūr and endowed it with lands and gold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatiEṁ namaḥ śrīsarasvatyāeṁ namaḥ . śrīgurubhyōṁnamaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhē mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīvijayābhyudayaśā
livāhanaśakavaruṣa 1440 saṁdu nālvattūṁdaneya varttamāna pramādisaṁvatsarada kārttika śuddha 2 ma
ṁgaḷavāradalū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kruṣṇarāyamahārāyarū vijayanaga
riya śiṁhvāsanadalū cittavisi samastaduṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipālaneyā(ā)gi sakalava(ṁ)rnadhar(ṁ)ma
śramagaḷanu pratipāḷisutta yiha kāladalū śrīvīrakruṣṇarayamahārāyarū bārakūra rājyavanu ratnappa
voḍeyarige pālisi Āvara kumāra vijayappavoḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu Āḷuva ka ladalū
basarura paḍuvakēriya seṭikāṟa jokiseṭiyara magaḷu kōcisaṭiya naraṇaseṭiya heṇḍatti se
ṭiyabaḷiya tirumakaseṭitti tānu maṭhavanu kaṭisi dharmakke biṭa sarvasvada vivara Ānegaḷiya voḷage gōviṁda
mūḍakareya maga vāsudēvamūḍakareya mūlada bāḷu baḍagaḷu mitāṁtakaḷa gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu mūḍalu dēvatara baḷiyavara gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu mūḍakareyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu sāyaṁṇana guṁpuḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu �yo nā
luku gaḍiyiṁdoḷaguḷa hosamāṭada bāḷu nāghaṁḍugadalu rmū gade kaṭu kaḷi mana maṁdu mara phala sahita biḍāruvāra(vāra)vāgi tiruma
seṭi māḍikoṁḍu koṭa Ardha Aruvārake doḍavaraha ga 120 kuṁdige varaha ga 3 hoḍekaṭige varaha ga 3 mūlādige varaha ga 25 mayisā
la varaha ga 25 �yo bāḷige teṟu heraḷe hebārana hadi 1 . = mūrura hebārana hadi ... = vosariteṟu Anāya kaḷaci nāghaṁ lū A mu
32 Anegaḷiya kruṣṇauruḍeya hebārana mūlada jaṁna kāu sahita vosari 16 ṟa mēle seṭṭikāṟa cokiseṭiyarū Ādiyāgi koṭa kāṭi hoṁ ga 211 A
nadamēle tirumakkaseṭiti Ardhādhiyāgi koṭṭa kāṭi hoṁ ga 209 baḍḍi Aki nāla mu ¥ ... 5 hoṇegāṟa kōṭikaṁḍa gōviṁdahebārana naḍisikoḍuvanu
heraḷeya heyahebārana jannavanū seṭikāṟa tirumaseṭi Ādhiya māḍikoṁḍa Ardha Ādiyāgi mādaseṭiya Aḷiya saṁkaraseṭi koṭa
doḍavaraha ga 100 A nūṟa varahananū tirumakkaseṭiti koṭu Ārdha baṁdarū Uti baṁdarū tirumakaseṭiti tanage Uḷadu Eṁdu māḍikoṁḍu
Ā heraḷeyahebārana Ēṇi mukhadalū kālakālake naḍasuva Ā mu 10 mattaṁ śaṁkharamēlāḍi yaṁcaṇamēlāḍiyavara mūla
kayapāḍiya �yośvarabāhiriya Aruvārada bāḷu bovaṇana bage Eṁba bāḷa catusīme nāgana tōṭadiṁda teṁkalu Aribaḷiyava
ra gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu baḍagaṇa ture yi hoṟatāgi kaḷi sahitavāgi baḍagalu halara gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu �yo nāluku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage
bituvudu nāghaṁ mu 4 maneṭhāu tōṭa mattaṁ haṁdaṭinaṁba gade mu 1 hā 30 maneya baḍaga(ṁ)ṇa kaḷiyoḷage yalamuḷiya hāḷi
mu hā 10 Aṁtu mu 7 gadeya mēle Aṁtarāruvāra Ardhādhi mayisāla sahitavāgi koṭa doḍavaraha ga 95 teṟu Anāya kaḷaci
naḍava A nāghaṁ mu 44 Ī bāḷige teṟu mārūra hadivo 1 . = heraḷehadi vo = mattaṁ heraḷiyahebārana mēle maisālavā
gi koṭa vara ga 24 teṟa mū 2 bāḍakaipāliya Oḷage tirumaseṭige baṁda bhāgi nāraṇahāḷana maga viṣṇuhāḷana
mūlada baḍaga tāṟu mu 1 hā 20 kuṁñaṇakāraṁtana maga kruṣṇakāraṁtana mūlada teṁka tāṟina voḷagaṇa
mu hā 20 gōviṁdabiṁnāṇiya maga koṁmebiṁnāṇiya mūlada baḍaga tāṟinalu hā 26
yidake Aki mu 4 . mattaṁ hūtāḷa kaḷa mūla Ugarabhaṁḍāriya Aruvāra tirumaseṭi
ya māva malapabhaṁḍāriya Aṁtarāruvārada kaliAnataravoḷage tirumaseṭiya bhāgi mūṟoṁ
du pāla Ardha kāṭi hoṁnu ga 50 ke Aki nāgha mu 3 . 0
Digital edition of SII 9.511 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
